idle.heading: Let AI Handle It
idle.body: Start a session and hand the call to "Ramesh Kumar" — a persona that keeps a scammer talking while UPI IDs, bank accounts, phone numbers, and scripted scam phrases are extracted in real time.

active.uploadHint: WAV, FLAC, or OGG — up to 25 MB
active.noPersonaReply: No reply generated for this turn.

digitalArrest.reportPrompt: This looks risky — you can file an NCRP complaint or bank dispute pre-filled with what was detected.

errors.micDenied: Microphone access was denied — you can still upload an audio file instead.
errors.micUnsupported: Recording isn't supported in this browser — upload an audio file instead.
errors.noFile: Record or upload an audio file first.
